note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment aims to image the motion of fully reconstituted CMG (Cytosolic Mutagenesis Group) using a hybrid ensemble and single-molecule assay. The goal is to study the dynamic behavior of the CMG complex under controlled conditions.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "A researcher in a lab coat and gloves uses a pipette to transfer liquid into a microtube.",
    "The researcher then places the microtube into a spectrophotometer for DNA concentration measurement.",
    "Subsequently, the researcher washes the sample with buffer B and buffer C, ensuring no clumps are visible.",
    "The researcher adds an elution buffer containing biotin to the sample.",
    "The experiment involves monitoring the sample's behavior over time using a software interface."
  ],
  "materials_and_subjects": [
    "DNA samples, buffers (B, C), biotin, microtubes, spectrophotometer, software for data analysis"
  ],
  "tools_and_setup": [
    "Microtube, pipette, spectrophotometer, computer with software for data analysis"
  ],
  "quantitative_observations": [
    "Volumes of buffer used: 500 μL each for washing steps.",
    "Time intervals monitored by the software for data collection."
  ],
  "key_transitions": [
    "Transfer of liquid from pipette to microtube.",
    "Placement of microtube into spectrophotometer.",
    "Washing process with buffer B and C.",
    "Addition of elution buffer with biotin.",
    "Monitoring of sample behavior over time using software."
  ],
  "outcomes_or_indicators": [
    "Visible changes in sample behavior over time as monitored by the software.",
    "Measurement of DNA concentration using the spectrophotometer."
  ],
